hypothesis.topic: Causal Dynamical Triangulations of Fractal Spacetimes and their Implications for Quantum Gravity
hypothesis.hypothesis: In a fractal spacetime, the spectral dimension of the spacetime, as measured by causal dynamical triangulation (CDT), will converge to 2.08 ± 0.05 at scales smaller than the Planck length, indicating a fundamental discreteness of spacetime and providing evidence for Asymptotic Safety in quantum gravity.

invention.name: Project Alpha-Centauri
invention.concept: A specialized tool using Causal Dynamical Triangulations of Fractal Spacetimes and their Implications for Quantum Gravity to optimize Computing.
